name: compute_adr_projection
description: Project ADR forward over N years with annual growth rate and optional inflation. Returns yearly ADR, RevPAR, and room revenue. Use this to validate ADR growth recommendations.

start_adr.description: Starting average daily rate in dollars

growth_rate.description: Annual ADR growth rate (0-1 decimal, e.g., 0.03 for 3%)

inflation_rate.description: Optional: annual inflation rate added to growth (0-1 decimal)

occupancy.description: Optional: stabilized occupancy to compute RevPAR (0-1 decimal)

room_count.description: Optional: room count to compute annual room revenue
